message:
test(fcp-core): add credential injection unit tests and helpers

Implements test coverage for flywheel_connectors-nnja (Credential Injection Unit Tests):

capability.rs:
- Add CapabilityConstraints.is_credential_allowed() method
- Add CapabilityConstraints.validate_credential() method
- Add 7 tests for credential_allow enforcement

credential.rs:
- Add CredentialObject.is_ip_literal() for IPv4/IPv6 detection
- Add CredentialObject.has_ip_literal_in_host_allow() method
- Add CredentialObject.validate_host_policy() for IP literal rejection
- Add 12 tests for IP literal detection and host policy validation
- Add 5 tests for CredentialId canonicity

credential_golden_vectors.rs (new):
- Golden vectors for cross-implementation verification
- Capability gating tests (allow/deny scenarios)
- Host binding validation tests
- Zeroize discipline verification tests

Blocked: Egress proxy injection tests depend on kt9r completion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
